2: Miserable comforters are are ye all.
3: Or what emboldeneth thee that thou answerest?
4: And shake mine head at you.
5: And the moving of my lips should asswage your grief your grief .
6: And though though I forbear, what am I eased?
7: Thou hast made desolate all my company.
8: And my leanness rising up in me beareth witness to my face.
9: Mine enemy sharpeneth his eyes upon me.
10: They have gathered themselves together against me.
11: And turned me over into the hands of the wicked.
12: And set me up for his mark.
13: He poureth out my gall upon the ground.
14: He runneth upon me like a giant.
15: And defiled my horn in the dust.
16: And on my eyelids is is the shadow of death;
17: Also my prayer is is pure.
18: And let my cry have no place.
19: And my record is is on high.
20: but but mine eye poureth out tears tears unto God.
21: As a man pleadeth pleadeth for his neighbour!
22: Then I shall go the way whence whence I shall not return.
